title: SuperFlat Survival Addon
description: An addon that allows for players to survive on superflat, without structures and without using cheats.  (Works with most mods)
body: This add-on will add small features to the game, that will allow for easy setup upon joining a superflat world, and allowing the player to access the rest of the dimensions and allows for more progression in superflat. This also includes the materials upon entering the world, that will allow the player to progress and play through superflat without any difficulties, which without, could lead to players to have to turn on cheats, and ruin their full survival play through in superflat. The only use for this pack, is for easy setup upon joining your first superflat world, and a couple requirements must be met to allow this pack. First, this pack is best played on superflat, BUT it must disable generating structures, for the full experience. There are only slight changes added to the game, and none of them will impact the way you play superflat, but it will allow the player to achieve all the other dimensions, and be able to obtain a lot more of a variety of blocks. The one change to the game that will be the most impactful, will be the new recipe that was added to then reach the end, so the player will be able to defeat the Ender Dragon and complete the game.
